mapper.select: SELECT * FROM document_file WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND status = 'active' ORDER BY CASE WHEN branch_name = 'main' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, branch_name
SELECT * FROM document_file WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND branch_name = #{branchName} AND status = 'active' LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE document_file SET status = 'deleted', update_time = NOW() WHERE document_id = #{documentId} AND branch_name = #{branchName} AND branch_name != 'main'
